heroic_strike.name: Reaver Strike
heroic_strike.description: A strong attack that increases melee damage by $d. Activates on your next swing.

battle_shout.name: Iron Bellow
battle_shout.description: A shout that increases the attack power of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

demoralizing_shout.name: Direhowl
demoralizing_shout.description: Lets out a fearsome shout, reducing the damage dealt by all nearby enemies by 20% for 20 sec.

charge.name: Onrush
charge.description: Rushes an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range.

thunder_clap.name: Quaking Blow
thunder_clap.description: Blasts nearby enemies for $d damage and slows their attacks by 10% for 10 sec.

hamstring.name: Hobbling Cut
hamstring.description: Maims the enemy for $d damage, slowing its movement by 50% for 15 sec.

bloodrage.name: Blood Toll
bloodrage.description: Generates 10 rage at the cost of health.

overpower.name: Redhand
overpower.description: Instant attack (2 charges) for weapon damage plus $d that empowers your next Maiming Strike by 20% (stacks twice). Cannot be dodged.

raging_gale.name: Twinstrike
raging_gale.description: Instantly strike with your weapon twice, each hit dealing 40% weapon damage plus $d, and generate 8 rage. Stores up to 2 charges. (Fury)

execute.name: Early Grave
execute.description: Attempt to finish off a wounded foe, causing $d damage. Only usable on enemies below 20% health.

slam.name: Brute Swing
slam.description: Swings brutally at the opponent for 50% weapon damage plus $d, generating 8 rage.

red_harvest.name: Red Harvest
red_harvest.description: Spend everything: strike three times in a frenzy for 65% weapon damage plus $d each, always Enraging you. (Fury)

enrage_passive.name: Mayhem
enrage_passive.description: Passive: while Enraged you deal 7% more damage, attack 25% faster and move 10% faster for 4 sec. Bloodletting has a 30% chance to Enrage you; Red Harvest always does. (Fury)

furious_mending.name: Furious Mending
furious_mending.description: For 10 sec you take 20% reduced damage, and while it lasts your Bloodletting heals you for 20% of your maximum health. (Fury)

emboldening_roar.name: Emboldening Roar
emboldening_roar.description: Lets loose an emboldening roar: you and friendly players within 40 yards are Emboldened, and your next 3 abilities are guaranteed critical strikes. (Fury)

raised_guard.name: Raised Guard
raised_guard.description: Brace behind your shield: you take 50% reduced Physical damage for 6 sec. Stores up to 2 charges. (Protection)

iron_resolve.name: Iron Resolve
iron_resolve.description: Grit your teeth and ignore the pain: spends up to 40 rage (20 minimum) to absorb 4 damage per rage spent, lasting up to 10 sec. (Protection)

faultline.name: Faultline
faultline.description: Send a shockwave through the ground: enemies in front of you within 8 yards take $d damage and are stunned for 3 sec. (Protection)

defiant_bellow.name: Defiant Bellow
defiant_bellow.description: A defiant bellow: every enemy within 10 yards is taunted, compelled to attack you for 3 sec. (Protection)

breachmaker.name: Breachmaker
breachmaker.description: Batter the target for weapon damage plus $d and crack its guard: your own attacks against it deal 20% more damage for 8 sec. (Arms)

measured_fury.name: Measured Fury
measured_fury.description: Your measured fury sharpens your economy: your abilities cost 10% less rage. (Arms)

seasoned_soldier.name: Seasoned Soldier
seasoned_soldier.description: Your critical auto-attacks generate 10% more rage. (Arms)

diabolical_twinstrike.name: Diabolical Twinstrike
diabolical_twinstrike.description: While Enraged, your Twinstrike deals 15% more damage. (Fury)

cleaving_blows.name: Cleaving Blows
cleaving_blows.description: Red Harvest always refunds a charge of Twinstrike. (Fury)

sudden_death.name: Sudden Death
sudden_death.description: Your auto-attacks have a chance to let you cast Early Grave on a target at any health, costing no rage. (Arms)

sweeping_strikes.name: Widening Arc
sweeping_strikes.description: For 12 sec your single-target attacks also strike 1 nearby enemy for full damage. (Arms)

deep_wounds.name: Gaping Wounds
deep_wounds.description: Passive: your Maiming Strike leaves the target bleeding for Physical damage over 6 sec. (Arms)

cleave.name: Reaping Arc
cleave.description: A sweeping strike that hits all enemies in front of you for $d damage.

revenge.name: Revenge
revenge.description: Attack in a wide arc, dealing 18 to 24 Physical damage to all enemies in front of you. Above 5 targets the damage is reduced. When you dodge or parry, your next Revenge may cost no rage. (Protection)

battle_stance.name: Battle Stance
battle_stance.description: An aggressive combat stance: you generate 10% more rage. The default stance for Arms and Protection.

berserker_stance.name: Berserker Stance
berserker_stance.description: A reckless combat stance: your critical strikes land 3% more often and hit for 3% more. The Fury warrior always fights in this stance.

defensive_stance.name: Guarded Stance
defensive_stance.description: A defensive combat stance: you generate 30% more threat but deal and take 10% less damage. Cast Battle Stance to return to the offensive.

sunder_armor.name: Armor Shear
sunder_armor.description: Sunders the target's armor, reducing it by $d% per application. Stacks up to 5 times. Generates a high amount of threat.

taunt.name: Goad
taunt.description: Goads the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec.

fireball.name: Cinderbolt
fireball.description: Hurls a fiery ball that causes $d Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

fireball_form.name: Ember Form
fireball_form.description: Transform into a blazing ember, increasing movement speed by $b%. You cannot attack or cast spells while transformed. Recast to return to your normal form.

frost_armor.name: Hoarfrost Mantle
frost_armor.description: Encases you in frost, increasing armor by $b for 30 min.

arcane_intellect.name: Aether Insight
arcane_intellect.description: Increases the Intellect of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

frostbolt.name: Rimelance
frostbolt.description: Launches a bolt of frost, causing $d Frost damage and slowing movement by 40%.

ice_lance.name: Ice Lance
ice_lance.description: Hurl a shard of ice, dealing $d Frost damage, tripled against a frozen target. Spends Fingers of Frost, or a charge of Winter's Chill, to treat the target as frozen. (Frost)

flurry.name: Winterlash
flurry.description: Loose three icy bolts for $d Frost damage each and plant Winter's Chill on the target: its next 2 incoming compatible spells treat it as frozen. Brain Freeze makes Winterlash instant, 30% harder, and skips its cooldown. (Frost)

frozen_orb.name: Frozen Orb
frozen_orb.description: Release an orb of swirling frost that drifts forward for 8 sec, dealing $d Frost damage each second to nearby enemies and slowing them by 30%. Its strikes generate Fingers of Frost. (Frost)

glacial_spike.name: Glacial Spike
glacial_spike.description: Conjure a massive spike of ice, consuming 5 Icicles to deal $d Frost damage and freeze the target in place for 4 sec. (Frost)

blizzard.name: Blizzard
blizzard.description: Conjures an ice storm at the target area: after a 2 sec cast it rages for 6 sec, dealing 12 to 16 Frost damage each second and slowing enemies by 40%. Each enemy struck shaves 0.5 sec off Frozen Orb, up to 3 sec per cast. (Frost)

glacial_front.name: Glacial Front
glacial_front.description: Hold to gather a widening front of frost, then release it in a cone. Longer charges reach farther and deal more damage. All enemies hit are slowed by 50% for 4 sec; maximum charge also roots them for 1 sec. (Frost)

dragons_breath.name: Dragon's Breath
dragons_breath.description: Hold to gather a widening breath of flame, then release it in a cone. Longer charges reach farther and deal more damage. Enemies hit are disoriented and damage breaks the effect; maximum charge always critically strikes and counts once toward Hot Streak. (Fire)

fingers_of_frost.name: Fingers of Frost
fingers_of_frost.description: Rimelance has a 15% chance to grant Fingers of Frost, up to 2 charges: your next Ice Lance treats its target as frozen. (Frost)

brain_freeze.name: Brain Freeze
brain_freeze.description: Rimelance has a 20% chance to make your next Winterlash instant, 30% harder, and free of its cooldown. (Frost)

shatter.name: Brittle Ruin
shatter.description: Your spells gain 50% critical strike chance against frozen targets, and those critical strikes deal 20% more damage. Fingers of Frost and Winter's Chill count as frozen. (Frost)

conjure_water.name: Waterbind
conjure_water.description: Conjures 2 bottles of water, restoring mana when drunk. Higher ranks conjure purer water.

conjure_food.name: Breadbind
conjure_food.description: Conjures 2 servings of bread, restoring health when eaten. Higher ranks conjure heartier fare.

fire_blast.name: Cinderfall
fire_blast.description: Blasts the enemy for $d Fire damage. Instant.

arcane_missiles.name: Aether Darts
arcane_missiles.description: Launches Aether Darts at the enemy, causing $d Arcane damage each second for 3 sec.

polymorph.name: Bewitch
polymorph.description: Transforms the enemy into a toad for up to $t sec. The toad wanders and heals rapidly. Any damage breaks the effect. Beasts and humanoids only.

frost_nova.name: Icebind
frost_nova.description: Freezes all nearby enemies in place for up to 8 sec, dealing $d Frost damage.

arcane_explosion.name: Aetherburst
arcane_explosion.description: A burst of Arcane energy hits all nearby enemies for $d Arcane damage.

flamestrike.name: Flamestrike
flamestrike.description: Calls down a burst of flame at the target area, dealing $d Fire damage to enemies caught in the blast. Can critically strike (one strike for the whole blast).

rain_of_fire.name: Rain of Fire
rain_of_fire.description: Calls a rain of fire onto the target area for 4 sec, burning enemies for $d Fire damage each second.

volley.name: Volley
volley.description: Rains arrows on the target area for 3 sec, dealing $d damage every 0.5 sec to enemies caught in it.

hurricane.name: Galeheart
hurricane.description: Calls a hurricane onto the target area for 6 sec, battering enemies for $d Nature damage each second.

earthquake.name: Earthquake
earthquake.description: Shakes the target area for 6 sec, battering enemies for $d Nature damage every 1.5 sec.

scorch.name: Scald
scorch.description: Scalds the enemy for $d Fire damage and quickens you by 20% for 3 sec. Quick to cast, and castable while moving.

pyroblast.name: Pyrelance
pyroblast.description: Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes $d Fire damage plus additional damage over time.

temporal_mend.name: Temporal Mend
temporal_mend.description: Draws an ally a moment forward in time, mending $d health as the body settles into its healthier future self. (Chronomancy signature)

temporal_barrier.name: Temporal Barrier
temporal_barrier.description: Shifts the target a heartbeat out of the present, a temporal shell absorbing $d damage for 10 sec before the timeline snaps back.

temporal_echo.name: Temporal Echo
temporal_echo.description: Marks an ally with an echo of a healthier moment, mending $d health at once. For $t sec, part of the Arcane damage you deal is drawn back through the echo to heal them.

temporal_cascade.name: Temporal Cascade
temporal_cascade.description: Sends an echo cascading through your group: the target and up to four of their nearest allies are mended at once and each marked for $t sec, drawing part of the Arcane damage you deal back through their echoes to heal them. (Chronomancy)

temporal_reversal.name: Temporal Reversal
temporal_reversal.description: Rewinds a fallen ally's timeline, returning them to life at their body with a portion of their health and mana, even in the thick of combat. (Chronomancy)

collective_reversal.name: Collective Reversal
collective_reversal.description: Rewinds every fallen member of your group or raid, returning them to life at their body with 30% health and mana. Cannot be cast in combat. (Chronomancy)

temporal_rewind.name: Rewind
temporal_rewind.description: Sends an arcane wave through your group or raid, rewinding time to restore 30% of the damage each ally within 40 yards took over the last 5 seconds (up to 35% of their maximum health). Cannot be a critical effect. (Chronomancy)

temporal_hourglass.name: Hourglass of Suspension
temporal_hourglass.description: Place a temporal hourglass at the selected location. Beneath an enemy, it suspends them for $e sec in PvE or $p sec in PvP and prevents all actions; damage breaks the effect. At your feet or beneath a group ally, it grants stasis for $t sec, prevents damage and actions, restores $h% of maximum health, and makes cooldowns recover $s% faster for you or $a% faster for an ally. On empty ground, the hourglass waits for $g sec and affects the first valid unit to step on it. The beneficial aura can be removed manually.

perfect_moment.name: Perfect Moment
perfect_moment.description: Seize your perfect moment: instantly gain 4 Arcane Charges, and for 10 sec Aether Darts does not consume them. (Chronomancer)

temporal_acceleration.name: Temporal Acceleration
temporal_acceleration.description: Accelerates the flow of time for your group or raid, increasing attack, casting, and channeling speed by 30% for 15 sec. Allies recently affected by Temporal Acceleration or Storm Chorus are too exhausted to benefit. (Chronomancy)

arcane_surge.name: Aether Surge
arcane_surge.description: Draws a surge of raw aether through the enemy for $d damage. Each cast leaves an Arcane Charge that raises your next Aether Surge's damage and cast speed (5% faster each) but sharply raises its mana cost, stacking up to 4; Aether Darts spends the charges. Each cast can also arm Aether Rush, making your next Aether Surge free and twice as fast to cast.

ice_barrier.name: Frostveil
ice_barrier.description: Shields you in ice, absorbing $d damage for 60 sec.

sinister_strike.name: Wicked Slash
sinister_strike.description: An instant strike for weapon damage plus $d. Awards 1 combo point.

backstab.name: Craven Thrust
backstab.description: Drive your dagger into the target's back for 150% weapon damage plus $d. Must be behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

gouge.name: Eye Jab
gouge.description: Strikes the target for $d damage, incapacitating it for 4 sec. Any damage breaks the effect. Awards 1 combo point.

evasion.name: Ghostfoot
evasion.description: Increases your dodge chance by 50% for 15 sec.

slice_and_dice.name: Cutthroat Tempo
slice_and_dice.description: Finishing move that increases melee attack speed by 30%. Lasts longer per combo point.

sprint.name: Swift Heels
sprint.description: Increases your movement speed by 70% for 15 sec.

kidney_shot.name: Low Blow
kidney_shot.description: Finishing move that stuns the target. Lasts 1 sec longer per combo point.

ambush.name: Lurker's Strike
ambush.description: Strike from the shadows for 250% weapon damage plus $d. Must be stealthed and behind the target. Requires a dagger. Awards 1 combo point.

stealth.name: Duskveil
stealth.description: Conceals you in the shadows: enemies barely notice you, but you move 50% slower. Attacking or taking damage breaks Duskveil. Cast again to step out.

adrenaline_rush.name: Quickened Blood
adrenaline_rush.description: Your blood runs hot, instantly restoring 60 energy.

garrote.name: Throat Wire
garrote.description: Loop a wire around the enemy's throat, causing $d damage now and bleeding it for $o over 18 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 1 combo point.

cheap_shot.name: Gut Punch
cheap_shot.description: Strike the target for $d damage, stunning it for 4 sec. Must be stealthed. Awards 2 combo points.

sap.name: Sap
sap.description: Incapacitates the target for 8 sec. Must be stealthed and out of combat. Any damage breaks the effect.

crippling_poison.name: Leaden Venom
crippling_poison.description: Strikes the target with a crippling poison, dealing $d Nature damage and slowing its movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

expose_armor.name: Armor Breach
expose_armor.description: Finishing move that exposes the target, reducing its armor by $d% for 30 sec.

rupture.name: Bleed Out
rupture.description: Finishing move that wounds the target, causing it to bleed for $d over 16 sec.

vanish.name: Smokestep
vanish.description: Melt from sight, entering Duskveil even in combat. You move 50% slower while hidden. Lasts up to 10 sec.

instant_poison.name: Adder's Bite
instant_poison.description: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 8 additional Nature damage.

deadly_poison.name: Festering Venom
deadly_poison.description: Coats your weapon for 30 min, causing each of your melee swings to deal 14 additional Nature damage.

blind.name: Dirt Toss
blind.description: Tosses dirt into the target's eyes, causing it to wander disoriented for 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

seal_of_righteousness.name: Oathbrand
seal_of_righteousness.description: Fills you with Holy power for 30 sec, causing each of your melee swings to deal $d additional Holy damage. Unleash with Verdict.

devotion_aura.name: Steadfast Aura
devotion_aura.description: Increases the armor of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

judgement.name: Verdict
judgement.description: Unleashes your active Seal upon the enemy, consuming it to deal its judgement damage.

blessing_of_might.name: Oath of Iron
blessing_of_might.description: Blesses the party, increasing the attack power of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

divine_protection.name: Ward of Faith
divine_protection.description: A holy shield absorbs $d damage for 10 sec.

sacred_bulwark.name: Sacred Bulwark
sacred_bulwark.description: For $t sec, the next enemy hit that would kill you is denied, restoring you to 35% health instead.

lay_on_hands.name: Last Rite
lay_on_hands.description: A massive surge of healing: restores $d health. 10 min cooldown.

holy_taunt.name: Sacred Goad
holy_taunt.description: Goads the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec.

flash_of_light.name: Lightmend
flash_of_light.description: A quick, efficient flash of Light that heals a friendly target for $d.

exorcism.name: Rite of Expulsion
exorcism.description: Banishes the wicked with Holy wrath, causing $d Holy damage.

consecration.name: Holy Ground
consecration.description: Consecrates the ground beneath you, searing nearby enemies for $d Holy damage every 2 sec for 10 sec.

righteous_fury.name: Burning Oath
righteous_fury.description: Increases the threat generated by your Holy damage by 60% for 30 min. The tanking paladin's cornerstone.

retribution_aura.name: Requital Aura
retribution_aura.description: Surrounds you with holy energy for 30 min, dealing 5 Holy damage to any enemy that strikes you in melee.

tame_beast.name: Wildbond
tame_beast.description: Begins taming a beast to be your companion. It must be your level or lower and not an elite. Your pet follows you, attacks your enemies, and holds threat of its own. You may have one pet at a time.

dismiss_pet.name: Release Companion
dismiss_pet.description: Releases your pet back to the wild.

revive_pet.name: Patch Up
revive_pet.description: Patch up your companion, restoring 240 health over 12 sec if it is alive. If it is dead, revive it at 35% health.

raptor_strike.name: Gutting Strike
raptor_strike.description: A strong melee attack that increases damage by $d. Activates on your next swing.

aspect_of_the_hawk.name: Harrier's Guise
aspect_of_the_hawk.description: Take on the aspect of the hawk, increasing attack power by $b for 30 min.

serpent_sting.name: Venom Barb
serpent_sting.description: Stings the target, dealing $d Nature damage over 15 sec.

arcane_shot.name: Fell Shot
arcane_shot.description: An instant shot that deals $d Arcane damage.

concussive_shot.name: Rattling Shot
concussive_shot.description: Dazes the target for $d damage, slowing movement by 50% for 4 sec.

mongoose_bite.name: Counterfang
mongoose_bite.description: Counterattack after the target dodges for weapon damage plus $d. Cannot be dodged.

wing_clip.name: Fettering Slash
wing_clip.description: Inflicts a wound for $d damage, slowing the enemy by 40% for 10 sec.

aspect_of_the_monkey.name: Marten's Guise
aspect_of_the_monkey.description: Take on the aspect of the monkey, increasing your dodge chance by 8% for 30 min.

aspect_of_the_cheetah.name: Courser's Guise
aspect_of_the_cheetah.description: Take on the aspect of the cheetah, increasing movement speed by 30% for 30 min.

aimed_shot.name: Long Draw
aimed_shot.description: A carefully aimed shot that deals $d damage.

rapid_fire.name: Fevered Draw
rapid_fire.description: Increases your attack speed by 40% for 15 sec.

smite.name: Smite
smite.description: Smites the enemy for $d Holy damage.

power_word_fortitude.name: Litany of Resolve
power_word_fortitude.description: Increases the Stamina of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

shadow_word_pain.name: Dirge of Decay
shadow_word_pain.description: A word of darkness causes $d Shadow damage over 18 sec.

power_word_shield.name: Psalm of Warding
power_word_shield.description: Shields the target, absorbing $d damage for 30 sec.

renew.name: Lingering Grace
renew.description: Heals the target for $d over 15 sec.

mind_blast.name: Mindfracture
mind_blast.description: Blasts the target's mind for $d Shadow damage.

heal.name: Solemn Prayer
heal.description: A slow but powerful prayer that heals a friendly target for $d.

mind_flay.name: Litany of Woe
mind_flay.description: Assaults the target's mind with Shadow energy, causing $d Shadow damage each second for 3 sec.

flash_heal.name: Urgent Prayer
flash_heal.description: A fast prayer that heals a friendly target for $d.

lightning_bolt.name: Arc Bolt
lightning_bolt.description: Hurls a bolt of lightning for $d Nature damage.

rockbiter_weapon.name: Stonebound Weapon
rockbiter_weapon.description: Imbues your weapon with the fury of stone: each swing deals $d additional damage for 5 min.

chain_heal.name: Chain Heal
chain_heal.description: Heals a friendly target for 120 to 145, then jumps to up to 2 additional nearby allies, healing for 50% less with each jump. (Restoration signature)

earth_shock.name: Earthen Jolt
earth_shock.description: Instantly shocks the target with concussive force for $d Nature damage.

lightning_shield.name: Thunder Ward
lightning_shield.description: Surrounds you with crackling lightning: melee attackers take $b Nature damage, up to 3 charges and at most once every 5 seconds.

flame_shock.name: Cinder Jolt
flame_shock.description: Sears the target with fire for $d damage plus $o over 12 sec.

flametongue_weapon.name: Pyrebrand Weapon
flametongue_weapon.description: Imbues your weapon with elemental fire: each swing deals $d additional Fire damage for 5 min.

frost_shock.name: Rime Jolt
frost_shock.description: Instantly shocks the target with frost for $d Frost damage and slows its movement by 50% for 8 sec.

frostbrand_weapon.name: Rimebound Weapon
frostbrand_weapon.description: Imbues your weapon with biting frost: each swing deals $d additional damage for 5 min.

ghost_wolf.name: Shadewolf
ghost_wolf.description: Turns you into a Shadewolf, increasing movement speed by 40%. Cast again to return to normal form.

stormstrike.name: Ancestral Strike
stormstrike.description: Channels the storm through your weapon, instantly striking for weapon damage plus $d.

shadow_bolt.name: Gloom Bolt
shadow_bolt.description: Sends a shadowy bolt at the enemy for $d Shadow damage.

demon_skin.name: Fiendhide
demon_skin.description: Demonic skin increases your armor by $b for 30 min.

immolate.name: Burning Pact
immolate.description: Burns the enemy for $d Fire damage and an additional $o over 15 sec.

corruption.name: Blackrot
corruption.description: Corrupts the target, causing $d Shadow damage over 18 sec.

curse_of_agony.name: Hex of Anguish
curse_of_agony.description: Curses the target with agony: $d Shadow damage over 24 sec.

drain_life.name: Consume
drain_life.description: Drains the target's life, transferring $d health to you each second for 5 sec.

fear.name: Harrow
fear.description: Strikes terror into the enemy, leaving it cowering for up to 8 sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

searing_pain.name: Sear
searing_pain.description: Sears the enemy with agonizing fire for $d Fire damage. Quick to cast.

shadowburn.name: Duskfire
shadowburn.description: Instantly blasts the target with searing shadow for $d Shadow damage.

summon_imp.name: Summon Emberkin
summon_imp.description: Summons an Emberkin under the command of the Warlock. The Emberkin hurls Ashbolts at your enemies from afar. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

summon_voidwalker.name: Summon Gloomshade
summon_voidwalker.description: Summons a Gloomshade under the command of the Warlock. The Gloomshade is a sturdy demon that taunts your enemies and soaks up punishment. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

summon_succubus.name: Summon Duskborn
summon_succubus.description: Summons a Duskborn under the command of the Warlock. The Duskborn is a fragile demon that strikes quickly and hits hard in melee. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

summon_felhunter.name: Summon Spellhound
summon_felhunter.description: Summons a Spellhound under the command of the Warlock. The Spellhound harries enemies from range with Gloombite and excels at hunting spellcasters. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

summon_felguard.name: Summon Warfiend
summon_felguard.description: Summons a Warfiend under the command of the Warlock. The Warfiend is a durable melee demon that wades into battle and holds its own. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

summon_infernal.name: Summon Pyre Colossus
summon_infernal.description: Binds a Pyre Colossus to your will — a hulking juggernaut with crushing melee and the deepest health and armor of any demon. A long cooldown gates its raw power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

summon_doomguard.name: Summon Wraithborn
summon_doomguard.description: Binds a Wraithborn to your will — an elite demon that rains heavy Shadow damage from afar. A long cooldown gates its devastating power. Summoning a new demon dismisses your current one. You may have one demon at a time.

wrath.name: Wildbolt
wrath.description: Hurls a bolt of nature energy for $d Nature damage.

mark_of_the_wild.name: Wildward
mark_of_the_wild.description: Places the Wildward on the party, increasing all attributes of all party members by $b% for 30 min.

moonfire.name: Lunar Tempest
moonfire.description: Burns the enemy with moonfire for $d Arcane damage plus damage over time.

rejuvenation.name: Wildbloom
rejuvenation.description: Heals the target for $d over 12 sec.

thorns.name: Briarguard
thorns.description: Thorns sprout from the target: melee attackers take $b Nature damage.

entangling_roots.name: Gripping Roots
entangling_roots.description: Roots the target in place for up to 12 sec.

bear_form.name: Bruin Form
bear_form.description: Shapeshift into a bear: armor +90%, greatly increased attack power, your attacks build rage and generate 30% more threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

bear_charge.name: Bruin Rush
bear_charge.description: Rush an enemy, generating 9 rage and stunning it for 1 sec. 8-25 yd range. Bruin Form only.

maul.name: Bonecrush
maul.description: A mauling attack that increases melee damage by $d and causes a high amount of threat. Activates on your next swing. Bruin Form only.

growl.name: Menace
growl.description: Menaces the target: your threat rises to match its most hated enemy and it is compelled to attack you for 3 sec. Bruin Form only.

demoralizing_roar.name: Craven Roar
demoralizing_roar.description: Demoralizes nearby enemies, reducing their attack power by 20 for 20 sec. Bruin Form only.

cat_form.name: Wolf Form
cat_form.description: Shapeshift into a wolf: agility rises with your level, attack power +8 plus 2 per level, your attacks use energy and combo points, and you generate 29% less threat. Cast again to return to caster form.

prowl.name: Stalk
prowl.description: Enter stealth while in Wolf Form, moving 50% slower. Cannot be used in combat.

rake.name: Flense
rake.description: A stealth opener that rakes the enemy for weapon damage plus $d and causes bleeding damage over 9 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

claw.name: Claw
claw.description: Claw the enemy for weapon damage plus $d. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

ferocious_bite.name: Gorebite
ferocious_bite.description: Finishing move that causes $d. Wolf Form only.

swipe.name: Sweeping Claws
swipe.description: Sweep your claws through nearby enemies for $d damage. Causes extra threat. Bruin Form only.

regrowth.name: Second Bloom
regrowth.description: Heals a friendly target for $d and an additional amount over 21 sec.

barkskin.name: Oakhide
barkskin.description: Your skin hardens like bark, increasing armor by 150 for 15 sec.

primal_reflexes.name: Primal Reflexes
primal_reflexes.description: Your instincts sharpen, increasing your chance to dodge by 50% for 6 sec.

starfire.name: Skyfall
starfire.description: Calls down a bolt of stellar fire, causing $d Arcane damage.

travel_form.name: Fleet Form
travel_form.description: Instantly shift into a swift travel form, increasing movement speed by 40%. You cannot use other abilities while shifted, but can shift in or out of combat, ideal for escaping.

enrage.name: Stoke
enrage.description: Generates 20 rage instantly. Bruin Form only.

bash.name: Concuss
bash.description: Stuns the target for 2 sec. Bruin Form only.

faerie_fire.name: Witchlight
faerie_fire.description: Decreases the target's armor by $d% for 40 sec. Does not stack with Armor Shear.

hibernate.name: Slumber
hibernate.description: Forces the target into a deep sleep for up to 8 sec. Any damage will awaken it.

dash.name: Dash
dash.description: Sprint forward, increasing movement speed by 50% for 15 sec. Wolf Form only.

pounce.name: Slinkstrike
pounce.description: A stealth opener that stuns the target for 2 sec. Awards 1 combo point. Wolf Form only.

insect_swarm.name: Stinging Swarm
insect_swarm.description: The enemy is swarmed by insects, taking $d Nature damage over 12 sec.

tigers_fury.name: Wolfsblood
tigers_fury.description: Increases attack power by $b for $t sec. Wolf Form only.

rip.name: Rip
rip.description: Finishing move that causes $d Bleed damage over 12 sec. Consumes combo points. Wolf Form only.

mortal_strike.name: Maiming Strike
mortal_strike.description: A vicious strike dealing weapon damage plus $d and reducing healing the target receives by 50% for 10 sec. Applies Gaping Wounds (bleed). (Arms signature)

bloodthirst.name: Bloodletting
bloodthirst.description: Instantly attack in a blood frenzy for $d, healing you for 3% of your maximum health and generating 12 rage. Has a 30% chance to Enrage you. (Fury signature)

shield_slam.name: Shieldcrack
shield_slam.description: Slam the target with your shield for $d and massive threat, generating 15 rage. (Protection signature)

whirlwind.name: Bladed Gyre
whirlwind.description: Spin in a deadly arc, striking all nearby enemies for $d and generating rage for each foe struck instead of costing any. Your next 2 single-target abilities also strike enemies near their target. (Fury talent)

berserker_rage.name: Seething Fury
berserker_rage.description: Enter a berserker rage, generating 20 rage. (Warrior talent)

pummel.name: Jawcrack
pummel.description: Interrupts spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. Generates 10 rage when it stops a cast.

heroic_leap.name: Heroic Leap
heroic_leap.description: Leap to the target area, dealing $d damage to nearby enemies on landing.

rallying_cry.name: Valor Roar
rallying_cry.description: Lets loose a valorous roar, granting you and party members within 40 yards 20% additional maximum health for 10 sec. Protection: they also take 5% less damage for the duration.

storm_bolt.name: Storm Bolt
storm_bolt.description: Hurl your weapon at the target for $d, stunning it for 3 sec.

intimidating_shout.name: Intimidating Shout
intimidating_shout.description: A terrifying shout that sends up to 5 enemies within 8 yards fleeing in fear for 8 sec. Damage may break the effect.

bladestorm.name: Bladestorm
bladestorm.description: Become a whirling storm of steel, striking all enemies within 6 yards for $d every second for 4 sec.

victory_rush.name: Victory Rush
victory_rush.description: Strike for weapon damage plus $d and heal 20% of your maximum health. Only usable within 20 sec of killing an enemy.

piercing_howl.name: Piercing Howl
piercing_howl.description: A piercing shout that slows all enemies within 15 yards by 50% for 8 sec.

die_by_sword.name: Die by the Sword
die_by_sword.description: Defensive cooldown: for 8 sec you take 30% less damage and dodge far more attacks.

recklessness.name: Recklessness
recklessness.description: Enrage: your rage generation increases by 50% and your critical strike chance by 20% for 12 sec.

avatar.name: Avatar
avatar.description: Transform into a colossus for 20 sec, breaking all control on you and increasing your damage dealt by 20%.

sanguine_aura.name: Sanguine Aura
sanguine_aura.description: Imbue your weapon with the blood of your foes: you and your melee allies gain 10% attack speed and 10% damage for 20 sec.

crusader_strike.name: Crusader Strike
crusader_strike.description: Strikes the target for weapon damage plus $d Holy damage. (Paladin talent)

metamorphosis.name: Dread Aspect
metamorphosis.description: Transform into a monstrous demon for 20 sec, increasing your spell damage by 20% and casting speed by 20%. Your demon gains 50% damage and 20% casting speed. (Demonology signature)

holy_shock.name: Holy Shock
holy_shock.description: Shocks a friendly target with Holy energy to heal them, or an enemy for $d Holy damage. (Holy signature)

holy_shield.name: Hallowed Wall
holy_shield.description: Hurls a radiant aegis at an enemy for 90 to 110 Holy damage, then bounces to 2 nearby enemies for 60 to 75 Holy damage each. (Protection signature)

bestial_wrath.name: Howling Rage
bestial_wrath.description: Sends you into a bestial rage, increasing your attack power by 20% and your pet damage by 100% for 15 sec. (Beast Mastery signature)

trueshot_aura.name: Sureflight Aura
trueshot_aura.description: Inspires nearby allies, increasing attack power by 10% for 30 min. (Marksmanship signature)

wyvern_sting.name: Wyvern Sting
wyvern_sting.description: Stings the enemy from range, incapacitating it for up to 4 sec. Any damage breaks the effect. (Survival signature)

arcane_power.name: Aether Surge
arcane_power.description: Increases spell damage by 20% and spell haste by 10% for 10 sec. (Arcane signature)

combustion.name: Phoenix Trance
combustion.description: Combust: for 10 sec your Fire spells always critically strike, including bolts already in flight. Off the global cooldown. These crits build Hot Streak like any other. (Fire signature)

cone_of_cold.name: Frostsweep
cone_of_cold.description: Blasts nearby enemies with frost for $d Frost damage. (Frost signature)

icy_veins.name: Icy Veins
icy_veins.description: Increases spell haste by 30% and prevents cast interruption and pushback for 10 sec. (Frost signature)

cold_blood.name: Killer's Calm
cold_blood.description: Focuses your killing intent so your next attack is a critical strike. (Assassination signature)

blade_flurry.name: Mirrored Blades
blade_flurry.description: Unleashes a flurry of blades, increasing attack speed by 20% for 12 sec. (Combat signature)

hemorrhage.name: Red Ribbon
hemorrhage.description: Strikes the enemy for weapon damage plus $d, causes bleeding damage over 12 sec, and increases bleed damage taken by 40%. Awards 1 combo point. (Subtlety signature)

power_infusion.name: Anointing
power_infusion.description: Infuses a friendly target with power, increasing spell haste by 20% for 15 sec. (Discipline signature)

holy_nova.name: Holy Nova
holy_nova.description: Causes an explosion of Mending Light, healing nearby allies for $d and damaging nearby enemies. (Holy signature)

shadowform.name: Gloamveil
shadowform.description: Assume a Gloamveil, empowering shadow magic until you shift back. Cast again to return to normal form. (Shadow signature)

elemental_mastery.name: Primal Mastery
elemental_mastery.description: Calls on primal mastery, making your next spell instant. (Elemental signature)

siphon_life.name: Veinleech
siphon_life.description: Siphons life from the enemy, causing $d Shadow damage over 30 sec and healing you for the damage done. (Affliction signature)

conflagrate.name: Conflagrate
conflagrate.description: Consumes your Burning Pact on the enemy to ignite them for $d Fire damage. (Destruction signature)

moonkin_form.name: Moonwing Form
moonkin_form.description: Shapeshift into a fearsome Moonkin, increasing your spell damage by 20% and your armor by 50%. Lasts until you shift out. Cast again to return to caster form. (Balance signature)

feral_charge.name: Primal Surge
feral_charge.description: Unleash a primal surge. In Wolf Form, Energy regeneration is increased by 100% for 10 sec. In Bruin Form, instantly generates 50 Rage. (Feral signature)

swiftmend.name: Swiftmend
swiftmend.description: Consumes a heal-over-time effect on a friendly target to heal them for $d. (Restoration signature)

kick.name: Boot
kick.description: Interrupts the target's spellcast and prevents casting from that school for 4 sec.

blink.name: Flickerstep
blink.description: Teleports you 15 yd forward and breaks roots. (Mage talent)

counter_shot.name: Hushing Shot
counter_shot.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. (Hunter talent)

counterspell.name: Spellbreak
counterspell.description: Counters enemy spellcasting, preventing any spell in that school from being cast for 6 sec. (Mage talent)

deep_freeze.name: Deadfrost
deep_freeze.description: Deep freezes the target, dealing $d Frost damage and stunning it for 4 sec. (Mage talent)

evocation.name: Aetherwell
evocation.description: Channel for 6 sec: each second restores 100 mana and builds 8 spell power, stacking while you channel and lasting 15 sec. (Mage talent)

ice_block.name: Cold Coffin
ice_block.description: Encases you in solid ice for 8 sec, becoming immune to all damage and effects and removing every harmful effect. Usable while stunned or polymorphed. You cannot act while encased. Recast to cancel. (Mage)

mend_pet.name: Patch Up
mend_pet.description: Heals a friendly target for $d over 15 sec. (Hunter talent)

meteor.name: Meteor
meteor.description: Calls a meteor down on the target area: after a 2 sec fall it deals 90 to 120 Fire damage and Ignites everything it strikes. (Fire)

presence_of_mind.name: Racing Mind
presence_of_mind.description: Makes your next spell with a cast time instant. Lasts 60 sec. (Mage talent)

ice_floes.name: Ice Floes
ice_floes.description: Your next two spells with a cast time can be cast while moving. Lasts 15 sec. (Mage talent)

greater_invisibility.name: Greater Invisibility
greater_invisibility.description: Vanish for 20 sec: removes 2 damage-over-time effects and you take 90% less damage while invisible and shortly after. (Mage talent)

rings_of_frost.name: Ring of Frost
rings_of_frost.description: Summons a ring for 10 sec. Enemies crossing its perimeter are frozen for 4 sec. (Mage talent)

cold_snap.name: Winter's Recall
cold_snap.description: Finishes the cooldown on Flickerstep, Frostveil, and Greater Invisibility. (Mage talent)

mass_barrier.name: Mass Barrier
mass_barrier.description: Shields you and up to 4 nearby allies within 30 yd, each absorbing 130 damage for 60 sec. (Mage talent)

overload.name: Overload
overload.description: Your next spell is amplified by 40% but costs 50% more mana. Lasts 10 sec. (Mage talent)

power_echo.name: Power Echo
power_echo.description: Your next direct spell repeats at 50% power on the same target. Lasts 10 sec. (Mage talent)

rune_of_power.name: Rune of Power
rune_of_power.description: Inscribe a rune of power at your feet for 15 sec: allies standing within 8 yd deal 10% more damage. (Mage talent)

blazing_barrier.name: Blazing Barrier
blazing_barrier.description: Wreathe yourself in flame, absorbing 130 damage for 60 sec. (Fire)

ignition.name: Ignition
ignition.description: Passive: your spell critical strikes burn the target for 40% of the damage dealt over 6 sec, stacking. (Fire mastery)

hot_streak.name: Hot Streak
hot_streak.description: Passive: two critical strikes in a row with your Fire spells (Cinderbolt, Cinderfall, Scald, Pyrelance or Flamestrike) make your next Pyrelance or Flamestrike instant and free. The spenders count toward the NEXT streak, free casts included; a Flamestrike counts once however many enemies it strikes, and only the initial impact ever counts. (Fire)

summon_water_elemental.name: Summon Water Elemental
summon_water_elemental.description: Summon a Water Elemental to fight beside you, hurling Waterbolts at your target and channeling Water Jet. (Frost)

rebuke.name: Reproach
rebuke.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. (Paladin talent)

skull_bash.name: Headbutt
skull_bash.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 4 sec. (Druid talent)

spell_lock.name: Gag Order
spell_lock.description: Interrupts spellcasting and prevents any spell in that school from being cast for 5 sec. (Warlock talent)

cleansing_verdict.name: Cleansing Verdict
cleansing_verdict.description: Purges a harmful magic effect from a friendly target and heals them for $d Holy.

holy_wrath.name: Saint's Ire
holy_wrath.description: Unleashes holy power, damaging nearby enemies for $d. (Paladin talent)

divine_shield.name: Lightward
divine_shield.description: Shields you with holy power, absorbing 900 damage for 8 sec. (Paladin talent)

avenging_wrath.name: Wrathwing
avenging_wrath.description: Calls down avenging power, increasing attack power by 60 and spell power by 30 for 20 sec. (Paladin talent)

hammer_of_wrath.name: Tolling Hammer
hammer_of_wrath.description: Hurls a holy hammer at a wounded enemy for $d Holy damage. Only usable below 20% health. (Paladin talent)

aura_surge.name: Dawnward Ricochet
aura_surge.description: Hurl a dawnforged shield for $d Holy damage and silence the primary target for 2 sec. It bounces to up to 2 additional enemies within 10 yd for 75% damage per bounce. (Paladin talent)

startle_shot.name: Startle Shot
startle_shot.description: A wild shot that disorients the target for $t sec. Any damage breaks the effect.

frost_trap.name: Rime Snare
frost_trap.description: Places a frost trap at your feet that arms after 1.5 sec. The first enemy to touch it is frozen for 3 sec, unable to move or act. One trap at a time. Lasts 60 sec. (Hunter talent)

multi_shot.name: Splitshot
multi_shot.description: Loose a spread at the target area, dealing $d Physical damage to enemies within 8 yd. (Hunter talent)

deterrence.name: Bristleguard
deterrence.description: Increases your dodge chance by 25 percentage points and reduces all damage taken by 30% for 10 sec. (Hunter talent)

aspect_of_the_wild.name: Wildfang Rally
aspect_of_the_wild.description: Inspires allies within 30 yd with wild strength, increasing attack power by 45 and attack speed by 5% for 5 min. (Hunter talent)

smoke_screen.name: Smoke Screen
smoke_screen.description: Vanish into a cloud of smoke, increasing your chance to dodge by 30% for 8 sec.

preparation.name: Contingency
preparation.description: Finishes the cooldown on Swift Heels, Ghostfoot, and Smokestep. (Rogue talent)

ghostly_strike.name: Wraith Strike
ghostly_strike.description: Strikes the enemy for weapon damage plus $d and briefly increases dodge. Awards 1 combo point. (Rogue talent)

cloak_of_shadows.name: Shadecloak
cloak_of_shadows.description: Wraps you in shadows, absorbing 420 damage for 5 sec. (Rogue talent)

shadowstep.name: Shadeslip
shadowstep.description: Steps through the shadows toward your target without breaking Duskveil. (Rogue talent)

silence.name: Hushword
silence.description: Silences the target for 4 sec. (Priest talent)

psychic_scream.name: Terror Canticle
psychic_scream.description: Frightens nearby enemies for up to 4 sec. Damage may break the effect. (Priest talent)

inner_focus.name: Stilled Mind
inner_focus.description: Makes your next spell free. Lasts 60 sec. (Priest talent)

mind_sear.name: Thoughtburn
mind_sear.description: Channels shadow energy at the target area, damaging nearby enemies each second for $d. (Priest talent)

healing_stream.name: Springwell
healing_stream.description: Restores 120 health to a friendly target over 12 sec. (Shaman talent)

chain_lightning.name: Skybranch
chain_lightning.description: Hurls lightning at the target area, damaging nearby enemies for $d. (Shaman talent)

earthbind.name: Gripping Earth
earthbind.description: Binds nearby enemies to the earth, rooting them for 2 sec. (Shaman talent)

bloodlust.name: Storm Chorus
bloodlust.description: Whips your group or raid into a frenzy, increasing attack, casting, and channeling speed by 30% for 15 sec. Allies recently affected by Storm Chorus or Temporal Acceleration are too exhausted to benefit. (Shaman talent)

spellsteal.name: Spellsteal
spellsteal.description: Steals a beneficial magic effect from an enemy, transferring it to yourself.

voidfeast.name: Voidfeast
voidfeast.description: Devours a magic effect (a beneficial one from an enemy, or a harmful one from an ally) and heals you for 6% of your maximum health. Only usable when there is an effect to devour.

howl_of_terror.name: Dread Chorus
howl_of_terror.description: Frightens nearby enemies for up to 3 sec. Damage may break the effect. (Warlock talent)

curse_of_exhaustion.name: Leaden Hex
curse_of_exhaustion.description: Curses the target, slowing movement by 30% for 12 sec. (Warlock talent)

death_coil.name: Morrowlash
death_coil.description: Strikes the enemy for $d Shadow damage, then horrifies them for 3 sec. (Warlock talent)

chaos_bolt.name: Ruinbolt
chaos_bolt.description: Hurls a bolt of chaotic fire for $d Fire damage. (Warlock talent)

typhoon.name: Typhoon
typhoon.description: A blast of wind knocks back all enemies within 8 yd and dazes them, slowing their movement by 50% for 4 sec.

innervate.name: Lifesap
innervate.description: Living sap wells up in you for 10 sec, restoring 20 of your current resource in waves: mana, Rage, or Energy, and shifting forms does not break it. Sleep, stun, or stasis stills the sap. (Druid talent)

frenzied_regeneration.name: Savage Mending
frenzied_regeneration.description: Restores 180 health over 10 sec. Bruin Form only. (Druid talent)

berserk.name: Red Haze
berserk.description: Increases attack power by 70 for 15 sec. (Druid talent)

tranquility.name: Gladesong
tranquility.description: Channels restorative energy for 4 sec, healing allies within 30 yd for 42 to 52 each second. (Druid talent)

sport_kick.name: Kick
sport_kick.description: Knock the ball along the ground toward the aim point.

sport_boot.name: Big Boot
sport_boot.description: A long lofted boot toward the aim point. The crowd loves it.

sport_hoof.name: Hoof It
sport_hoof.description: Hammer the ball low and hard up the field.

sport_punt.name: Long Punt
sport_punt.description: A keeper's punt, high and far.

sport_shoot.name: Shoot
sport_shoot.description: Hold to build power, release to shoot at goal. Too much power sails over.

sport_pass.name: Pass
sport_pass.description: Roll a firm pass to your targeted teammate, leading their run.

sport_feint.name: Feint
sport_feint.description: A quick sidestep burst toward the aim point.

sport_dive.name: Dive
sport_dive.description: Fling yourself toward the aim point. A crossing ball sticks to you.

sport_shoulder.name: Shoulder
sport_shoulder.description: A fair harvest-truce shoulder. Sends them tumbling off the ball.

sport_second_wind.name: Fresh Legs
sport_second_wind.description: Find your legs: move 50% faster for 4 sec.
